summary: All 12 steps + 1 prerequisite completed in a single iteration. Implemented: (1) OpaqueState type-erased container with Debug, new/downcast/downcast_ref/estimated_size_bytes in reify-types/src/warm.rs; (2) WarmStartable trait definition; (3) warm_state: Option<OpaqueState> field on NodeCache with manual Clone (clones as None); (4) CacheStore donate_warm_state/get_warm_state helpers with take semantics, record_evaluation clears warm_state; (5) WarmStatePool in reify-runtime with HashMap<NodeId, PoolEntry>, memory-budgeted LRU eviction (linear scan), donate/retrieve/clear/len/is_empty. All 86+ tests pass across reify-types, reify-eval, and reify-runtime.

All 18 steps + 1 prerequisite completed. Implemented: (1) EvalEvent/EventKind/EventPayload types with Clone+Debug; (2) EventJournal append-only struct with dual BTreeMap<Instant>/HashMap<NodeId> indices; (3) Query methods: events_for_node, events_in_range, events_since, latest_for_node; (4) Engine.journal field with accessor; (5) Instrumented eval() with Started/Completed for all 3 passes (Param/Auto, Let, Resolution); (6) Instrumented edit_param() with Started/Completed for re-evaluated Value nodes; (7) Instrumented eval_cached() with CacheHit for fast-path/cache-reuse and Started/Completed for cache misses. 25 unit tests + 3 integration tests all pass. All existing tests unaffected.

All 4 prerequisites and 18 steps completed. Implemented: (1) Clone+Debug derives for ReverseDependencyIndex; (2) reify-expr and reify-compiler as runtime dependencies; (3) ConcurrentEditSetup, ConcurrentNodeResult, ConcurrentEditResult data types in reify-eval; (4) Engine::prepare_concurrent_edit() extracting Clone-able state with PersistentMap O(1) clones; (5) Engine::apply_concurrent_edit() merging results back to cache/journal/snapshot; (6) ConcurrentEvalAdapter implementing AsyncNodeEvaluator with Arc<RwLock> interior mutability, eval_expr evaluation, content-hash early cutoff, reverse-index skip propagation; (7) edit_param_concurrent() orchestrating prepare→adapter→scheduler→result. 9 new tests: adapter single node, linear chain, 3 independent lets, diamond dependency, early cutoff, cancellation between levels, bracket sequential-vs-concurrent match, prepare_concurrent_edit setup verification, apply_concurrent_edit engine state verification. 238 total tests pass across reify-eval and reify-runtime.

description: Collapsed nested if-let/if chain in ConcurrentEvalAdapter::evaluate to satisfy clippy::collapsible_if. Three nested conditions merged into single let-chain guard.

summary: All 6 remaining steps completed (error-recovery rollback feature). Implemented: (1) Engine::rollback_concurrent_edit() restoring eval_set nodes from Pending to Final and rolling back version/snapshot IDs; (2) Updated edit_param_concurrent() to call rollback on SchedulerError before propagating Err; (3) Three new tests: rollback restores Pending→Final with correct cache/version state, rollback on TaskPanicked allows subsequent sequential edit, repeated error-then-success cycle validates full recovery across prepare→panic→rollback→concurrent_edit→apply. All 240+ tests pass across reify-eval and reify-runtime. Task 29 is now fully complete.
